title: Linkshift
description:
Tech Puzzle Action

                         An addictive new puzzle game with roguelike elements, full of action, strategy and deep scoring mechanics.      

 

Take advantage of randomized Boosters Upgrades and powerful Relics to find synergies and create rule breaking combinations.      

                 

                  Unlock and use new unique Relics with special powers to shape your strategy.

                   

Play multiple unique game modes, from relaxing in casual modes to deep strategizing in Exploration Mode.

60 FPS and fully handcrafted psychedelic graphics and human composed music to keep you in the flow. 

1.0 FEATURES:• 3 Game Modes

• Unlock new unique Relics

• Unlock new Boosters

• Unlock new levels & backgrounds

• Steam Global Leaderboards

• Steam Achievements

• Full controller support

• Full SteamDeck support

• Unique Soundtrack
description_short: A roguelite puzzle game for tinkerers and pixel junkies. Link Nodes, use Relics, get upgrades, find synergies, create massive combos, feel good.
